cards.title: Paediatric Nutrition & Growth
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Breastfeeding: WHO guidelines (6 months exclusive)
  • Complementary feeding: 6-month introduction
  • Normal growth velocity
  • Nutritional deficiencies: Fe, D, B12, Zn

cards.title: Paediatric Illness & Adolescents
cards._legacyHtml:

  • Febrile child management (Naturopathic)
